title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. nebrodense
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. nebrodense, also known as the Sardinian rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. nebrodense can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
